title: A Review on Microwave and Ultrasound‑Assisted Extractions of Essential Oil from Orange Peel Waste
author: Bodea, Ioana M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This review summarizes and critically discusses microwave-assisted and ultrasound-assisted extraction techniques applied to the recovery of essential oils from orange peel waste. It compares the efficiency, advantages, and limitations of both technologies, with emphasis on extraction yield, energy efficiency, and sustainability. The study highlights the potential of these green extraction methods for the valorisation of citrus by-products within a circular economy framework. 
 The final published version is available via the DOI  https://doi.org/10.1007/s11947-025-03882-x.
